title: November 10
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 10''' is the 314th day of the year (315th in leap years), with 51 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1931|1931]] – [[Don Henderson]] is born.
*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[William Hoyland]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Arve Juritzen]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Trevor Devall]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 73|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 73]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Josh Peck]] is born.
*[[1988]] – [[Sam Maggs]] is born.
*[[1991]] – [[Rick Cimino]] died.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Brain Spiders]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – [[Union 1|''Union'' 1]] published.
*[[2003]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 2]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2003 – [[Rovio Entertainment]] is founded.
*[[2004]] – [[Empire 26|''Empire'' 26]] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Temirlan Blaev]] is born.
*[[2010]] – [[Knight Errant: Aflame 2|''Knight Errant: Aflame'' 2]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Star Wars Insider Special Edition 2012|''Star Wars Insider'' Special Edition 2012]] released in '''UK'''.
*[[2012]] – "[[A Test of Strength]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[2014]] – "[[Out of Darkness]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2015]] – [[Daniel Fleetwood]] died. 
*2015 – [[Star Wars Insider 161|''Star Wars Insider'' 161]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[From Beneath]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[From a Certain Point of View: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: From the Journals of Obi-Wan Kenobi]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 1: The Destiny Path]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: The Jedi Mind]]'' published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars Insider 198|''Star Wars Insider'' 198]] published.
*[[2021]] – [[The High Republic (2021) 11|''The High Republic'' (2021) 11]] published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[The Mandalorian – The Graphic Novel of Season 2]]'' published in the UK.
*[[2023]] – "[[Mystery of the Opal Cave / Clash]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
